title: Local + CI Security Scanning

steps.description: Backend: Makefile (security-deps, security-iac, security-image-*, security-all, security-report), pyproject (pip-audit + bandit + [tool.bandit]), .trivyignore, .github/workflows/security-scan.yml, scripts/security_report.py, README/docs section
Code review of S01 (Makefile + workflow + configs)
Tests: smoke test asserting Make targets, dev deps, workflow jobs, action SHA pinning, bandit excludes, .trivyignore presence
